title: Frog's Roof Mod
description: Adds a thatch block so frogge can yeah
body:
### This adds Thatch Blocks, Stairs, Slabs.
Located in the building blocks tab, this conataines a block requested by my good old buddy old chum Froggor
![Showcase of all the block varients](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c188a9bc2f7b8254552386dcc6e2ae48daf3f8b.png)
